summary: Iteration 118 - Verified 3 tasks: (A) systemTemplates.ts industry fixes, (B) Industry-aware pipeline stages in KanbanBoard, (C) AddLeadModal commission fields gate. Found and FIXED bug in KanbanBoard where desktop column headers used LEAD_STATUS_LABELS instead of stageLabel().
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 tasks verified. Fixed bug in KanbanBoard.tsx lines 251 and 286 where desktop column headers used LEAD_STATUS_LABELS[status] instead of stageLabel(status). Mobile tabs were already correct. Test user is PHOTOGRAPHY industry so commission fields correctly hidden.

TASK_A_systemTemplates_no_GRAPHIC_DESIGN.details: grep 'GRAPHIC_DESIGN' backend/src/seeds/systemTemplates.ts returns 0 matches. Logo Design template has industry: 'DESIGN'.

TASK_A_INDUSTRY_TEMPLATE_MAP_3_keys.details: INDUSTRY_TEMPLATE_MAP has exactly 3 keys: PHOTOGRAPHY, DESIGN, FINE_ART. grep for VIDEOGRAPHY|ILLUSTRATION|SCULPTURE|WEB_DESIGN|BRANDING|CONTENT_CREATION|OTHER returns 0 matches.

TASK_B_industryLanguage_pipelineStageLab.details: industryLanguage.ts has pipelineStageLabels in all 3 industry branches. PHOTOGRAPHY NEW='Inquiry', DESIGN NEW='Brief', FINE_ART BOOKED='Agreement Signed'.

TASK_B_KanbanBoard_user_prop.details: KanbanBoardProps interface includes user?: { industry?: string; primaryIndustry?: string } (line 30-31).

TASK_B_KanbanBoard_getIndustryLanguage_i.details: KanbanBoard.tsx imports getIndustryLanguage (line 23) and uses stageLabel() function (line 48-49).

TASK_B_Dashboard_passes_user_to_KanbanBo.details: Dashboard.tsx passes user={user || undefined} to KanbanBoard (line 1219).

TASK_B_data_testid_unchanged.details: data-testid attributes use raw status values: kanban-column-new, kanban-column-contacted, etc.

TASK_B_desktop_column_headers_FIXED.details: FIXED BUG: Lines 251 and 286 were using LEAD_STATUS_LABELS[status] instead of stageLabel(status). Changed to use stageLabel(status) for industry-aware labels. Browser test confirmed: NEW shows 'Inquiry', CONTACTED shows 'Discovery Call' for PHOTOGRAPHY user.

TASK_C_AddLeadModal_user_prop.details: AddLeadModalProps interface includes user?: { industry?: string; primaryIndustry?: string } (line 47).

TASK_C_Dashboard_passes_user_to_AddLeadM.details: Dashboard.tsx passes user={user || undefined} to AddLeadModal (line 1349).

TASK_C_commission_fields_gate.details: Commission fields only render when BOTH projectType === 'COMMISSION' AND (user?.primaryIndustry === 'FINE_ART' || user?.industry === 'FINE_ART') (lines 423-424). Browser test confirmed: PHOTOGRAPHY user selecting COMMISSION does NOT see commission fields.

TASK_C_commission_header_styling.details: Commission section header uses text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] with Space Mono font (lines 426-428).

bug_fixed.description: KanbanBoard desktop column headers were using LEAD_STATUS_LABELS[status] directly instead of stageLabel(status), causing them to show default labels instead of industry-specific labels.
bug_fixed.fix: Changed LEAD_STATUS_LABELS[status] to stageLabel(status) in both mobile single-column view (line 251) and desktop horizontal columns (line 286).
